title: FTS order=DESC results into integrity-check failing
poc: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt0 USING fts4(c0, order=DESC);
bug_features_seed: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt1 USING fts4(c1 TEXT, c2 INTEGER, order=DESC);
CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT NOT NULL);
SELECT * FROM vt1 WHERE c2 IN (SELECT c2 FROM t1 WHERE value IS NOT NULL);
